name: dopamine-monorepo
description: Dopamine — gorgeous, next-generation visual effects & animated icons.

scripts.build: node tools/dopamine/src/cli.mjs build && npm run build -w @dopamine/core && npm run build -w @dopamine/effect-solarbloom -w @dopamine/effect-inkstroke -w @dopamine/effect-comic -w @dopamine/effect-fail -w @dopamine/effect-aurora -w @dopamine/effect-ripple -w @dopamine/effect-confetti -w @dopamine/effect-heartburst -w @dopamine/effect-lightning -w @dopamine/effect-halo && npm run build -w @dopamine/effects && npm run build -w @dopamine/react && npm run build -w @dopamine/demo
